run_summary.summary: Liz sent a batch of outbound follow-ups this evening — Yousky, Dreo, Govee, and Bedsure all got a nudge. Most urgent: Govee has a brand-side posting deadline of April 25 (TOMORROW) and there's still a $2K gap between Liz's $3K ask and their $1K offer from Vanzo Media — if this deal is going to happen at all, someone needs to bridge that gap today. Dreo (also Vanzo Media) is a similar situation — Liz quoted $3K back on April 1st and has been following up with zero response. Bedsure (Make Wonder INC) is also quiet after Liz's $4500 bundle quote. Yousky is the oldest thread — in negotiation since March at Liz's $2000 counter, and Kenny followed up April 13. Liz checked in again today. On the Popfly front, Osprey Packs just posted a UGC run campaign ($700 + free product, deadline April 28) — could be a quick easy win.

suggestions.message: Brand deadline is TOMORROW (April 25) and no response to Liz's $3K counter since April 3rd. Their offer was $1K. Either someone bridges the gap today or this deal dies. Worth a quick email to Muriel at muriel.tang@vanzomedia.com — even meeting at $2K might save it. ⏰

Liz has followed up three times now (Apr 1, Apr 14, Apr 22) on the Dreo misting fan deal. Yaki at Vanzo Media hasn't responded to the $3K quote. One more nudge or let it go — your call. The lake cabin no-AC angle Liz pitched today was a great hook though. 🌬️

Still waiting on Luna at Yousky for a response to the $2K counter. Thread has been open since March — Kenny followed up April 13, Liz again today. Give it until April 25 then decide whether to lower the rate or walk. 🏊

New Popfly campaign: S26 Run UGC Campaign — $700 + free product, application deadline April 28. UGC deal so it goes straight to invoicing after creation. Outdoor/active niche fits if Liz is doing summer content. Apply on Popfly before the 28th if interested. 🎒

deals.next_action: Follow up with Luna if no response on $2000 rate by Apr 25
deals.notes: [Apr 22]: Liz sent another follow-up to Luna (luna@yousky.com) checking in on the $2000 counter. Context: Yousky reached out in March about their pool/hot tub cleaner, Liz countered at $2000, Kenny followed up Apr 13 also asking to align at $2000 with hot tub angle.
deals.activity_note: Apr 22: Liz sent follow-up to Yousky — $2000 rate still on table, waiting on Luna

deals.next_action: Follow up with Yaki at Vanzo Media on $3000 rate — or decide whether to close out

[Apr 1]: Liz quoted $3000 for Dreo misting fan IG collaboration. Vanzo Media (Yaki) reached out Mar 31 about Dreo misting fan campaign. Deliverables and posting date not yet confirmed — pending rate agreement.

deals.next_action: URGENT — contact Muriel today about Govee: brand deadline is April 25, consider meeting closer to $2000

[Apr 3]: Liz quoted $3000 for 1x Instagram Video featuring Govee TV Backlights. Muriel (Vanzo Media) reached out Apr 2 offering $1000 with posting deadline April 25. Major rate gap: brand at $1000, Liz at $3000.

deals.next_action: Follow up with Iris on $4500 bundle rate if no response
